tagline: Your Locally Owned Shield Against Unwanted Pests
hero_subtitle: Park Forest's trusted pest control team. We protect Chicago Southland homes and businesses with proven, safe treatments that actually work.
service_area_description: Serving Park Forest, Matteson, Olympia Fields, Richton Park, Homewood, Flossmoor, and communities across the Chicago Southland.
seo_title: Chicago Pests LLC | Pest Control in Park Forest, IL
seo_description: Chicago Pests LLC in Park Forest, IL. Locally owned pest control serving the Chicago Southland. Residential and commercial extermination. Call 844-720-2847.
about_heading: Park Forest's Locally Owned Pest Control Team
services_subtitle: From roaches to rodents — comprehensive pest management for homes and businesses across the Chicago Southland.
reviews_subtitle: See why homeowners across Park Forest and the Chicago Southland trust us to keep their homes pest-free.
cta_heading: Bugs don't take days off. Neither do we.
cta_subtitle: Get a free inspection and customized treatment plan today.
footer_description: Locally owned pest control serving Park Forest and the Chicago Southland. Residential and commercial extermination, rodent control, and preventive treatments. Licensed and insured.

services_featured.name: General Pest Control
services_featured.description: Complete elimination of ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish, and other common household invaders. One-time or recurring plans available.

services_secondary.name: Bed Bug Extermination
services_secondary.description: Advanced heat and chemical treatments to completely eliminate bed bugs. We inspect, treat, and follow up to ensure total eradication.

services_accent.name: Rodent Control
services_accent.description: Rats and mice are more than a nuisance — they're a health risk. We trap, remove, and seal your property to stop them for good.

services_wide.name: Commercial Pest Management
services_wide.description: Restaurants, offices, and retail — we keep your business pest-free and compliant with health department standards.

about_features.title: Eco-Friendly Solutions
about_features.description: We use low-toxicity, EPA-approved products that eliminate pests while keeping your family and pets safe.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed by the State of Illinois. Every technician is trained, certified, and committed to your satisfaction.

about_features.title: Locally Owned & Operated
about_features.description: We live and work in the Southland. When you call, you get a neighbor who cares — not a call center.

reviews.name: Angela W.
reviews.text: Had roaches in our kitchen and they were gone within a week of treatment. The technician was thorough and explained everything. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Called about a mouse problem and they were out the next day. Sealed every entry point and set traps. Haven't seen one since. Great company.

reviews.name: Patricia H.
reviews.text: We use them for quarterly pest control and our home has been completely pest-free. Professional, on time, and very reasonably priced.
